Result.Name: Application Incomplete
Result.Description: Status is used for when a application is incomplete and waiting on customer action.  This will help the customer on the portal know the status of their permit.

Result.Name: Complete
Result.Description: Complete.  This status means the permit work is completed, and approved.

Result.Name: Denied
Result.Description: Status used if the application has been denied and will not be issued

Result.Name: Expired
Result.Description: Expired.  This status is used when a permit has expired and some action is needed.  Our IAA will auto update expired permits this status.  This status DOESN'T prevent anything, a hold would be needed to do this, which our IAA will add.

Result.Name: In Review
Result.Description: In Review.  This status is used when the permit is in plan review and not issued yet.

Result.Name: Inactive
Result.Description: This status is used when a application is waiting on customer action but longer than 6 months.

Result.Name: Issued
Result.Description: Issued.  This status means the permit work is in progress.

Result.Name: Non-Compliant
Result.Description: A permit has been issued, but conditions have changed so that the project no longer conforms to the rules, requirements or regulations under which the permit was issued.

Result.Name: On Hold
Result.Description: On Hold.  This status is used if the permit work is on hold for some reason other than Stop Work Order which has its own status.

Result.Name: On Hold - Customer Action Required
Result.Description: On Hold, need customer action to remove hold

Result.Name: Revoked
Result.Description: Permanently removing the authority to continue under the conditions specific to the permit issued.

Result.Name: Stop Work Order
Result.Description: Stop Work Order.  This status is used to identify a permit that is currently stopped due to a stop work order.  Adding the stop work order hold to a permit, will automatically update the permit status to "Stop Work Order"

Result.Name: Submitted
Result.Description: Submitted. This status is used when a permit has been submitted (NOT online), but a plan reviewer hasn't begun the review yet.

Result.Name: Submitted - Online
Result.Description: Submitted, Online.  This status is used as a default for online submissions that haven't had their review started yet.

Result.Name: Void
Result.Description: Void.  This status should be used if the permit is no longer valid.  This status should be used instead of deleting the permit.
